info.name: Currency Colon Costarricense
info.description: Costa Rican Colon (CRC) exchange rates relative to USD (base currency)

buyRate.description: Exchange rate to buy CRC with USD. Example: 497.55 means 1 USD = 497.55 CRC

sellRate.description: Exchange rate to sell CRC for USD. Example: 497.00 means 1 USD = 497.00 CRC
